cast.name: Rob Marin
cast.character: On Stage Security - Boston Hatch Shell

plot outline: John makes a Christmas miracle happen by bringing his one and only friend to life, his teddy bear. The two grow up together and John must then choose to stay with his girlfriend or keep his friendship with his crude and extremely inappropriate teddy bear, Ted.
title: Ted
